creator: rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com
text:
On 2012-11-21 15:57, Pawel Pekala wrote:
> Build still fails when PODOFO=off, should I remove PODOFO option and
> add podofo lib to library dependencies ?

Pawel,

My apologies. PODOFO is a requirement and can no longer be optional so 
that option can be completely removed.  Here's a corrected diff file now 
that has PODOFO as a requirement and no longer an option.

Rusty Nejdl
